names.name: Temple Bell of Yangming Puti Si
陽明菩提的拜鐘
Temple Bell of Yangming Sanguan Dian
陽明三官殿的拜鐘

text.transcription: 里詠又途謌化日光天世泰平

normalization.div: 里詠又途謌化日光天世泰平

transliterations.transliteration: lí 詠 又 tôo 謌 huà ji̍t Kong thinn sì Thài piânn
lei5 wing6 jau6 tou4 go1 faa3 jat6 gwong1 tin1 sai3 taai3 peng4/ping4
lǐ yǒng yòu tú gē huà rì guāng tiān shì tài píng

trans.div: Li Yong has another way to change the sun and bring peace to the world.
